<div class="OverviewRepoFiles-module__Box_1__OXeac">

<div class="OverviewRepoFiles-module__Box_2__zsLGk">

<div class="OverviewRepoFiles-module__Box_3__bBU1C" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/abstract">

## Repository files navigation

- <a href="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent#" class="prc-components-UnderlineItem-7fP-n" aria-current="page"><span data-component="icon"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="octicon octicon-book" /></span><span data-component="text" data-content="README">README</span></a>
- <a href="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent#" class="prc-components-UnderlineItem-7fP-n"><span data-component="icon"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="octicon octicon-people" /></span><span data-component="text" data-content="Contributing">Contributing</span></a>
- <a href="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent#" class="prc-components-UnderlineItem-7fP-n"><span data-component="icon"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="octicon octicon-law" /></span><span data-component="text" data-content="MIT license">MIT license</span></a>
- <a href="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent#" class="prc-components-UnderlineItem-7fP-n"><span data-component="icon"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="octicon octicon-law" /></span><span data-component="text" data-content="Security">Security</span></a>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="octicon octicon-list-unordered" />

</div>

<div class="js-snippet-clipboard-copy-unpositioned DirectoryRichtextContent-module__SharedMarkdownContent__hHXUL" hpc="true">

<a href="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent/blob/master/logo/logo-text.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img src="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent/raw/master/logo/logo-text.png" style="max-width: 100%;" width="264" alt="Reagent" /></a>

[<img src="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent/actions/workflows/clojure.yml/badge.svg" style="max-width: 100%;" alt="Run tests" />](https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent/actions/workflows/clojure.yml) <a href="https://clojars.org/reagent" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/d49da36f855bd21d81fd24f6d31d1bfd5c6d6d5d49e3cad90d6d8a5d94810805/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f636c6f6a6172732f762f72656167656e742e737667" style="max-width: 100%;" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/clojars/v/reagent.svg" alt="Clojars Project" /></a> <a href="https://cljdoc.org/d/reagent/reagent/CURRENT" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/d9820d0a5e57858a73e5a35d704633bc025fbfc0d96016f6888ae71af7bfe9cf/68747470733a2f2f636c6a646f632e6f72672f62616467652f72656167656e742f72656167656e74" style="max-width: 100%;" data-canonical-src="https://cljdoc.org/badge/reagent/reagent" alt="cljdoc badge" /></a> <a href="https://clojurians.slack.com/archives/C0620C0C8" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/48ab7abda5558ce13fb04e68fd480c1e94a19927b582719afb1d2d1772007e9a/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f736c61636b2d6a6f696e5f636861742d627269676874677265656e2e737667" style="max-width: 100%;" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/badge/slack-join_chat-brightgreen.svg" alt="project chat" /></a>

A simple [ClojureScript](http://github.com/clojure/clojurescript) interface to <a href="https://reactjs.org/" rel="nofollow">React</a>.

Reagent provides a way to write efficient React components using (almost) nothing but plain ClojureScript functions.

- **<a href="http://reagent-project.github.io/" rel="nofollow">Detailed intro with live examples</a>**
- **<a href="http://reagent-project.github.io/news/index.html" rel="nofollow">News</a>**
- **<a href="https://cljdoc.org/d/reagent/reagent/CURRENT" rel="nofollow">Documentation, latest release</a>**
- **Documentation, next release: <a href="http://reagent-project.github.io/docs/master/" rel="nofollow">API docs</a>, [Tutorials and FAQ](https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent/tree/master/doc)**
- **Community discussion and support channels**
  - **<a href="https://clojurians.slack.com/messages/reagent/" rel="nofollow">#reagent</a>** channel in <a href="http://clojurians.net/" rel="nofollow">Clojure Slack</a>
- **Commercial video material**
  - <a href="https://www.jacekschae.com/learn-reagent-free/tycit?coupon=REAGENT" rel="nofollow">Learn Reagent Free</a>, <a href="https://www.jacekschae.com/learn-reagent-pro/tycit?coupon=REAGENT" rel="nofollow">Learn Reagent Pro</a> (Affiliate link, \$30 discount)
  - <a href="https://www.jacekschae.com/learn-re-frame-free/tycit?coupon=REAGENT" rel="nofollow">Learn Re-frame Free</a>, <a href="https://www.jacekschae.com/learn-re-frame-pro/tycit?coupon=REAGENT" rel="nofollow">Learn Re-frame Pro</a> (Affiliate link, \$30 discount)
  - <a href="https://purelyfunctional.tv/guide/reagent/" rel="nofollow">purelyfunctional.tv</a>
  - <a href="https://lambdaisland.com/collections/react-reagent-re-frame" rel="nofollow">Lambda Island Videos</a>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto">

### Usage

<a href="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent#usage" id="user-content-usage" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Usage"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="octicon octicon-link" /></a>

</div>

To use Reagent in an existing project you add this to your dependencies in `project.clj`:

<a href="http://clojars.org/reagent" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/94a36aac75e78db8743d3fd86fc074a83eaf9a5af1d7c1044484afd25d25e7f3/687474703a2f2f636c6f6a6172732e6f72672f72656167656e742f6c61746573742d76657273696f6e2e737667" style="max-width: 100%;" data-canonical-src="http://clojars.org/reagent/latest-version.svg" alt="Clojars Project" /></a>  

And provide React using npm (when using e.g. <a href="https://shadow-cljs.github.io/docs/UsersGuide.html" rel="nofollow">Shadow-cljs</a>)

<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npm i react@19.2.3 react-dom@19.2.3">

``` notranslate
npm i react@19.2.3 react-dom@19.2.3
```

</div>

If there is a more recent minor or patch version of React available, it should be safe to use it in your application.

If you want to keep using React 18 or older versions, you can also use [cljsjs packages to provide React.](https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent/blob/master/doc/reagent1.md)

Reagent isn't tied to only React-dom but should work with [other renderers](https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent/blob/master/doc/ReactRenderers.md) also.

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto">

## Examples

<a href="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent#examples" id="user-content-examples" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Examples"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="octicon octicon-link" /></a>

</div>

Reagent uses [Hiccup-like](https://github.com/weavejester/hiccup) markup instead of JSX. It looks like this:

<div class="highlight highlight-source-clojure notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="(defn some-component []
  [:div
   [:h3 &quot;I am a component!&quot;]
   [:p.someclass
    &quot;I have &quot; [:strong &quot;bold&quot;]
    [:span {:style {:color &quot;red&quot;}} &quot; and red&quot;]
    &quot; text.&quot;]])">

    (defn some-component []
      [:div
       [:h3 "I am a component!"]
       [:p.someclass
        "I have " [:strong "bold"]
        [:span {:style {:color "red"}} " and red"]
        " text."]])

</div>

> **Since version 0.8:** The `:class` attribute also supports collections of classes, and nil values are removed:
>
> <div class="highlight highlight-source-clojure notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="[:div {:class [&quot;a-class&quot; (when active? &quot;active&quot;) &quot;b-class&quot;]}]">
>
>     [:div {:class ["a-class" (when active? "active") "b-class"]}]
>
> </div>

You can use one component inside another:

<div class="highlight highlight-source-clojure notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="(defn calling-component []
  [:div &quot;Parent component&quot;
   [some-component]])">

    (defn calling-component []
      [:div "Parent component"
       [some-component]])

</div>

And pass properties from one component to another:

<div class="highlight highlight-source-clojure notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="(defn child [name]
  [:p &quot;Hi, I am &quot; name])

(defn parent []
  [child &quot;Foo Bar&quot;])">

    (defn child [name]
      [:p "Hi, I am " name])

    (defn parent []
      [child "Foo Bar"])

</div>

You mount the component into the DOM like this:

<div class="highlight highlight-source-clojure notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="(defn mount-it []
  (rd/render [parent] (.-body js/document)))">

    (defn mount-it []
      (rd/render [parent] (.-body js/document)))

</div>

assuming we have imported Reagent like this:

<div class="highlight highlight-source-clojure notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="(ns example
  (:require [reagent.core :as r]
            [reagent.dom :as rd]))">

    (ns example
      (:require [reagent.core :as r]
                [reagent.dom :as rd]))

</div>

State is handled using Reagent's version of `atom`, like this:

<div class="highlight highlight-source-clojure notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="(defonce click-count (r/atom 0))

(defn state-ful-with-atom []
  [:div {:on-click #(swap! click-count inc)}
   &quot;I have been clicked &quot; @click-count &quot; times.&quot;])">

    (defonce click-count (r/atom 0))

    (defn state-ful-with-atom []
      [:div {:on-click #(swap! click-count inc)}
       "I have been clicked " @click-count " times."])

</div>

Any component that dereferences a `reagent.core/atom` will be automatically re-rendered.

If you want to do some setting up when the component is first created, the component function can return a new function that will be called to do the actual rendering:

<div class="highlight highlight-source-clojure notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="(defn timer-component []
  (let [seconds-elapsed (r/atom 0)]
    (fn []
      (js/setTimeout #(swap! seconds-elapsed inc) 1000)
      [:div
       &quot;Seconds Elapsed: &quot; @seconds-elapsed])))">

    (defn timer-component []
      (let [seconds-elapsed (r/atom 0)]
        (fn []
          (js/setTimeout #(swap! seconds-elapsed inc) 1000)
          [:div
           "Seconds Elapsed: " @seconds-elapsed])))

</div>

This way you can avoid using React's lifecycle callbacks like `getInitialState` and `componentWillMount` most of the time.

But you can still use them if you want to, either using `reagent.core/create-class` or by attaching meta-data to a component function:

<div class="highlight highlight-source-clojure notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" snippet-clipboard-copy-content="(defonce my-html (r/atom &quot;&quot;))

(defn plain-component []
  [:p &quot;My html is &quot; @my-html])

(def component-with-callback
  (with-meta plain-component
    {:component-did-mount
     (fn [this]
       (reset! my-html (.-innerHTML (rd/dom-node this))))}))">

    (defonce my-html (r/atom ""))

    (defn plain-component []
      [:p "My html is " @my-html])

    (def component-with-callback
      (with-meta plain-component
        {:component-did-mount
         (fn [this]
           (reset! my-html (.-innerHTML (rd/dom-node this))))}))

</div>

See the examples directory for more examples.

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto">

## Performance

<a href="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent#performance" id="user-content-performance" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Performance"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="octicon octicon-link" /></a>

</div>

React is pretty darn fast, and so is Reagent. It should even be faster than plain old javascript React a lot of the time, since ClojureScript allows us to skip a lot of unnecessary rendering (through judicious use of React's `shouldComponentUpdate`).

The ClojureScript overhead is kept down, thanks to lots of caching.

Code size is a little bigger than React.js, but still quite small. The todomvc example clocks in at roughly 79K gzipped, using advanced compilation.

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto">

## About

<a href="https://github.com/reagent-project/reagent#about" id="user-content-about" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: About"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="octicon octicon-link" /></a>

</div>

The idea and some of the code for making components atom-like comes from [pump](https://github.com/piranha/pump). The reactive-atom idea (and some code) comes from [reflex](https://github.com/lynaghk/reflex).

The license is MIT.

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
